---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Action or script being used (e.g. `update-activity`, `update-top-repos`)
2. Workflow YAML (or the command you ran locally)
3. Error message or unexpected output

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Environment

- Node.js version: (run `node --version`)
- OS: (e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 on GitHub-hosted runner)
- Toolkit version/ref: (e.g. `@main`, `@v1.2.0`)

## Additional context

Any other context, README snippets, or logs that might help.
